STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOUKRI, KARIM (SUED AS KHOKRI) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1510 EDDY ST, #411, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL FEB-27-1994, IF DEF.
